content:
The issue is that the series codes in column D of Task sheet don't match the series codes in column B of Data sheet, and the year values in row 10 of Task sheet don't match the year values in row 4 of Data sheet. Let me update the formulas to use the correct series codes and year values:

```json
{
  "analysis": "The mismatch in series codes and year values is causing the #N/A errors in the INDEX&MATCH formulas. I need to update the formulas to use the correct series codes and year values.",
  "plan": "I'll update the formulas to use the correct series codes and year values. I'll also add error handling to ensure that the formulas don't throw errors when the series codes or year values are missing.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF'
from openpyxl import load_workbook

file_path = 'gdp.xlsx'
wb = load_workbook(file_path)
task_ws = wb['Task']
data_ws = wb['Data']

# Update the formulas to use the correct series codes and year values
print("Updating formulas to use correct series codes and year values...")

# Fill in the Exports data (H12:L17)
print("\nFilling Exports data (H12:L17)...")
for row in range(12, 18):  # rows 12-17
    for col in range(8, 13):  # columns H-L (8-12)
        col_letter = chr(64 + col)
        # Use ! instead of . for sheet reference
        if task_ws[f"D{row}"].value and data_ws[f"B{row}"].value:
            formula = f"=INDEX(Data!$B$21:$M$40,MATCH($D{row},Data!$B$21:$B$40,0),MATCH({col_letter}$10,Data!$H$4:$M$4,0))"
            task_ws[f"{col_letter}{row}"].value = formula

# Fill in the Imports data (H19:L24)
print("Filling Imports data (H19:L24)...")
for row in range(19, 25):  # rows 19-24
    for col in range(8, 13):  # columns H-L (8-12)
        col_letter = chr(64 + col)
        if task_ws[f"D{row}"].value and data_ws[f"B{row}"].value:
            formula = f"=INDEX(Data!$B$28:$M$33,MATCH($D{row},Data!$B$28:$B$33,0),MATCH({col_letter}$10,Data!$H$4:$M$4,0))"
            task_ws[f"{col_letter}{row}"].value = formula

# Fill in the GDP data (H26:L31)
print("Filling GDP data (H26:L31)...")
for row in range(26, 32):  # rows 26-31
    for col in range(8, 13):  # columns H-L (8-12)
        col_letter = chr(64 + col)
        if task_ws[f"D{row}"].value and data_ws[f"B{row}"].value:
            formula = f"=INDEX(Data!$B$35:$M$40,MATCH($D{row},Data!$B$35:$B$40,0),MATCH({col_letter}$10,Data!$H$4:$M$4,0))"
            task_ws[f"{col_letter}{row}"].value = formula

wb.save(file_path)
print("\nFormulas updated!")

EOF
",
      "duration": 2.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
```
